# WorkFlowy - Ellipsis Fix [ARCHIVED] [![Install](https://img.shields.io/badge/Install-v2025.03.07-blue)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/elstgav/workflowy/main/dist/scripts/archive/ellipsis-fix/workflowy.ellipsis-fix.user.js)
